title: MossCreep
description: Moss blocks slowly and naturally spread to adjacent stone surfaces in humid biomes, creating organic environmental growth over time.
body:
# MossCreep

Adds moss block spreading to humid biomes (swamps, jungles, lush caves, mushroom fields). Moss gradually spreads onto stone, cobblestone, and stone brick when exposed to air with light levels below 12.

**Features:**
- Passive spreading via random tick simulation
- Respects world boundaries and block protection
- Configurable spread chance, radius, and biome list
- `/mosscreep reload` command (requires `mosscreep.admin`)
- `/mosscreep protect` to toggle chunk protection (requires `mosscreep.protect`)
- Minimal performance overhead with efficient chunk handling
